THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT IMPERIAL PARKING CORPORATION'S MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT: DENIED; triable issue of fact exists re: causation. Prevailing party is to prepare an order pursuant to CCP 437c(g). (301/JLW/EH) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Order Extending Jurisdiction Of Arbitrator 90 Days Beyond The April 14,2004 Expiration Date
Off Calendar Apr-16-2004 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Defendan Imperial Parking Corporation's Motion for Order Extending Jurisdiction of Arbitrator 90 Days beyond the April 14, 2004 expiration date is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. The Arbitrator's Jurisdiction is extended to 7/13/2004. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Court ordered the Arbitration OSC re-set to 8/5/2004 at 1:30 PM, in Department 212. Proceedings reported by: Beldon Yee. (212)
